name: Lean Made Simple: Transform Your Business & Life One Step At A Time!
description: Welcome to Lean Made Simple: a podcast for people who want to change their business and their lives one step at a time. I’m Ryan Tierney from Seating Matters, a manufacturing company from Limavady, Northern Ireland. Eight years ago I came across this thing called lean and it transformed my life and now I want to share this message with as many people as possible.

recent_episodes.title: Your Wealth Is Hiding in Waste (Lean Transformation Reality)
recent_episodes.description: Ryan Tierney (Lean Made Simple) sits down with producer Alastair Luke (Attention X) shares the brutally honest truth about what’s really happening six months into the Lean transformation at Sperrin Metal.Customers haven’t seen the benefits yet.Lead times have got worse.The factory is still operationally chaotic.And it’s been the most difficult thing he’s ever done.In this open and unfiltered conversation, Ryan explains what it actually looks like when you try to transform a 63-year-old manufa

recent_episodes.title: Transforming Sperrin Metal | Live from Gemba Summit 2025
recent_episodes.description: Only a few weeks into taking over Sperrin Metal, Ryan Tierney is revealing the first real progress inside one of the most chaotic factories he has ever stepped into in this podcast recorded live at the Gemba Summit.This is the story of what he found on day one, what has changed already, and how Lean Thinking is beginning to transform a 63-year-old manufacturing company from the inside out.In this first-phase update, Ryan shares the breakthroughs, the challenges, and the mindset shifts that ac

recent_episodes.title: The Lean Summit to Change your LIFE & BUSINESS
recent_episodes.description: Ryan Tierney (Lean Made Simple) delves deep into Ireland's BIGGEST ever Lean summit, Gemba Summit at Titanic Belfast, Northern Ireland on 20th-21st October 2025.Find out more about Gemba Summit and:- Whit can be your next lean TURNING POINT- Why people are travelling from all over the world to EXPERIENCE lean- HOW you can join some of the world top lean leaders➡️ Book your GEMBA SUMMIT tickets today: https://gembasummit.com➡️ Order the book, LEAN MADE SIMPLE: 12 PROVEN STEPS FOR CREATING A VI

score_reason: Manufacturing business transformation podcast that interviews leaders and could value Andreas's traditional industry + technology expertise, though lean manufacturing is adjacent to his core topics.

key_themes: Real-world manufacturing challenges and honest progress tracking
People development and leadership in lean environments
Standard work and continuous improvement systems
Making lean accessible to traditional industries
notable_guests: Thomas Robson Kanu (Premier League footballer turned SME owner)
enrichment.relevant_episode: How ROLLS ROYCE does LEAN — Aiden Rogers discusses shifting from tool-driven fixes to culture-led continuous improvement, which directly parallels Andreas's messaging about moving traditional industries from fear-based resistance to data-driven decision-making.
enrichment.coverage_gap: How AI and data analytics can accelerate lean decision-making and uncover hidden waste — the podcast covers lean methodology deeply but hasn't explored how modern intelligence tools help manufacturing leaders actually see and act on what's really happening on the floor.
enrichment.suggested_hook: The guy who built Canada's largest food agency then took those lean principles to agriculture using AI — here's how traditional boards finally stop trusting gut instinct and start competing like tech companies.
